title: Agregasyon Fonksiyonlari
subtitle: COUNT, SUM, AVG, MAX, MIN kullanimi.
code:
CREATE TABLE students (
    id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
    name TEXT NOT NULL,
    grade REAL,
    email TEXT
);

INSERT INTO students (name, grade, email) VALUES
    ('Ahmet Yilmaz', 85.50, 'ahmet@example.com'),
    ('Ayse Kaya', 92.00, 'ayse@example.com'),
    ('Mehmet Demir', 67.25, NULL),
    ('Zeynep Sahin', 78.75, 'zeynep@example.com'),
    ('Can Ozturk', 55.00, NULL);

-- Toplam ogrenci sayisi
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_students FROM students;

-- NULL olmayan email sayisi
SELECT COUNT(email) AS students_with_email FROM students;

-- Notlarin toplami
SELECT SUM(grade) AS total_grade FROM students;

-- Ortalama not
SELECT AVG(grade) AS average_grade FROM students;

-- En yuksek ve en dusuk not
SELECT MAX(grade) AS highest_grade, MIN(grade) AS lowest_grade FROM students;

-- Birden fazla agregasyon birlikte
SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    AVG(grade) AS avg_grade,
    MAX(grade) AS max_grade,
    MIN(grade) AS min_grade,
    SUM(grade) AS sum_grade
FROM students;

-- ROUND ile yuvarlama
SELECT ROUND(AVG(grade), 2) AS avg_grade_rounded FROM students;

-- Kosullu agregasyon (CASE WHEN ile)
SELECT
    COUNT(CASE WHEN grade >= 60 THEN 1 END) AS passing,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN grade < 60 THEN 1 END) AS failing
FROM students;
